refnamediv.refpurpose: The default comparison function used in the sort-merge.

listitem.para: a 1x1 matrix of doubles, the first value to be compared
a 1x1 matrix of doubles, the second value to be compared
a 1x1 matrix of floating point integers, the order. Returns order=0 is a is almost equal to b, order=-1 if a < b, order=+1 if a > b.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns -1 if and(a<b), returns 0 if and(a==b), returns +1 otherwise.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: order = scidoe_compare ( 1 , -1 ) // 1 order = scidoe_compare ( -1 , 1 ) // -1 order = scidoe_compare ( 1 , 1 ) // 0
